ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: B02E, XJA, X07, XJD, X07ph2,,X52,,X79,,X92, XJC, XJI, X87, X98 Engines: BR10DE (B4D), HR09DET (H4B), HR10DET (H4Dt), HR16DE (H4M) ECU: EMS3140 Soft: 0C00_100, 210, 310, 320, 340, 3A0, 5xx, 600 Author: DMA _______________________________________________

DTC: LM51 Items_Bases_DDT_S1738
Starting Point: EMS3140_0C00_100_V01 _______________________________________________

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joué
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joué
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE D: Status of test run at least once per trip
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Learning state of the TDC sensor

Label.Text: Manual range M+ and M- in AT
Bit 5: Stop and Start inhibited by ECM
Bit 12: Automatic or manual parking brake detected
Bit 15: Engine stop origine: emergency request
Bit 1: System conditions to go in automatic stop
Bit 2: Auto stop forbidden by BCM
Bit 8: Auto stop forbidden by powersteering system
Bit 13: Stop auto request aborted because of brake pressure conditions not reached
Bit 15: Stop auto forbidden due to energy management
Maximum duration the engine can stay automatically stopped
Ambiant pressure high threshold below which auto stop is forbidden
Ambiant pressure low threshold below which auto stop is forbidden
Minimum speed threshold to go to StopAuto after a deactivation of 4WD function
Maximum delay to confirm a StopAuto request by the driver (by braking pressure)
Delay before prompting auto stop MMI
Maximum slope value to authorize StopAuto (negative value)
Maximum slope value to authorize StopAuto (positive value)
Delay to detect rear gear engaged
Maximum vehicle speed to keep the engine automatically stopped
Delay to confirm that the vehicle is stoped (consolidation of slope value)
Vehicle speed threshold to validate the minimum travel conditions
Vehicle speed threshold to validate the minimum travel conditions in rear detected
Vehicle speed threshold to authorize automatic stop
Gear Lever position received on the CAN

Label.Text: Bit 14: Autostart sequence failed by system
"1" value - not OK (interdiction or failure detected)
Bit 0: Vehicle speed information validity status
Bit 2: BeginStroke clutch information validity status
Bit 3: EndStroke clutch information validity status
Bit 4: Neutral contact information validity status
Bit 5: Reverse contact information validity status
Bit 6: HV battery (RSA) or battery sensor (Nissan) info validity status
Bit 7: SAS disabled because of higher starter activation counter
Bit 8: Consolidated braking pressure information validity status
Bit 9: Brake pedal information validity status
Bit 10: Lever position information validity status
Bit 11: Road slope information validity status
Bit 13: Nissan ICR relay information validity status
Bit 14: Nissan IS relay information validity status
Bit 3: State of ECUs for S&S inhibition
Bit 8: Driver seat state information validity status
